title: Any experts out there with experience in building workflows for Hire Business'?

posts.author: Tble (Lizzie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There,
We are looking for an expert that may have experience in Monday.com with Hire Businesses specifically.
We have a premium linen hire business and looking for someone to help build off what we already have. We had a consulting business build the first part for us but the price is getting too high to keep working with them.
We need to be able to track work flow from prepping, shipping, returns, laundry then back to our shelves.
Hope to hear from someone!

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tble !

Welcome to the Community! My company (Lucid Day) has designed a complete solution for your exact needs. It allows you to track orders, prep, shipping, and returns. We have worked with hundreds of clients on a spectrum of different understandings in Monday.com. Some come with no knowledge of Monday.com and others come with full builds and just need some help optimizing their account.

We also believe in teaching you how to use your system and be as comfortable in using it as we are. So at the end of our time together, you won’t need to keep coming back for quick fixes and simple changes.

If you are interested in learning more you can visit our website at www.lucidday.com or even book a FREE consultation with us.

Hope to hear from you!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lizzie,

Thanks for your email. I’ve responded directly

Let me know if I can further assist.
Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Tble and welcome to the monday.com community forums! There are a lot of great partners here and I am sure you will find someone to assist you.

I work with CarbonWeb and we are a solutions provider that specializes in the creation of workflows. Our team takes a component-by-component style designed to make your build out flexible and creative. I think this project sounds very interesting and I would love to see how we can help expand your monday.com environment.

If you would like to chat please schedule some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
